TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cadiway, title = Cadiway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cadiway} }

S.FORM: == cadiway == O tadacifenekay ko finawlan no 'Amis, mafana' a misanga to sapifoting, onini a cadiway manga'ay a malanokamayan a cadiway, o sapiala sapipodaw sapifoting a losid, caay ka koesit a pisanga toni cadiway, o sowal no pasifana'ay a mato'asay i, hatosaen ko pifaloden to 'aol, i tenok noya tosa 'aol i, paketingen to kamokoay a 'aol, foloden to i kawanan ato kawili a misahongila, selak han matiya tono Amilika a tilid A , ikor to faloden ho to 'eric anoca o 'oway ko sapifalod a mikedec, saikoray, itini laeno noya A 'aol, sowoten paketingen to salil, ngoyos noya salil, patatodongen ko kakahad no 'aol, mahapinang to manga'ay a sapitatoy no nakamayan a sakatayal. Ano misanga' to cadiway, patatodongen to no niyah a takaraw, miming to, tata'ang to, caay kafilo a mikakoy. Itini i Fata'an ira ko cecay a tamdaw, ci Lalan hananay, O pisanga ningra to cadiway i, malecaday tono tao a pisanga, nikaorira, ira ko pifalic ningra to roma, kotayen no 'elic ko tapang nora 'aol, todohen cedeten ko si a mipaketing, toya 'elic, misakodaitan to 'elic, ikaka to no 'aol ko kahalafin. kalomaan O sapicadiway to mamangay foting i cilis ato ci'eci, itiya ho tadatingalaway ko nanom no 'alo to, silis to si'esi to, orasaka adihay ko mitaka hananay a mamangay foting, itira ko ma'emangay micadiway tofoting,. ano paka'en to kolong maparesap ko kolong, sa ira ko romi'ad a micadiway, matiya o tasalaman ko ma'emangay a mifoting, nikawrira o pihatatanam konini to picadiway. malakapah to i, itira to i riyariyaran a micadiway to podaw , poter no kedacay , ato hicay no toda. oninian sahetoay i lawac no riyar misi'ayaway to tapelik, ira ko tapelik itiyaay a micadiway, o roma tamdaw misi'ac ko tapelik itiyaay a micadiway. talahekal ko tapelik mahakelongay ko fakeloh ato tafok, wataay ko pisekong nona fakeloh to o'o' no micadiwaya, itira ko pihadidi to adada no 'o'o. salafii sa tomireng i tapelipelikan kinapinapina a mikakoy to cadihay, ano caka pakahadidi to roray caay to pakakaoy to cadiway, orasaka, tadamaanay to ko micadiwayay a tamdaw. Nikawrira,ano koma'en kita to podaw orama a tamdaw misa'osi'osiay ho, oya kahacecacecay no podaw iraay itira ko olah, harateng to sapaini ako to laloma'an ato widang sanay a faloco' sa adihay koni setikan masalafii. O podaw sahetoay misasimian a koma'en, o cilah,o damdam teli han i tawyu ha pitenasan, oroma i, mifasfasan i fafa'ed no podaw, ono niyah a nikaolah ko kakomaen, ano kama'en to podaw ca kaca citakid to 'epah ta caay ka fanglih ko ngoyos patahtah a koma'en. kaitiraan Malecad to sapifoting ko cadiway, manga'ay i riyar, i alo' a mifoting, i pala anoca i fanaw a micadiway. 1.i alo', ano sapiala to foting ko cadiway i, cicafay cikapot a tala alo' ko sanga'ayay, cecay tamdaw i mirepet to cadiway, tomireng i nanom no alo', pasi'ayawen to kafafaw no nanom ko ngoyos no cadiway, o cecay a tamdaw miala to papah no kilang, tepatepa han ko nanom no alo', o pilaplap to foting a misa'opo, pasayla toya cadiway a milaplap, masa'opo to a maala. 2.i riyar, I riyar, tona fafalic no romi'ad no kakarayan, kacanglahan ato kaciherangan, saka tosa polo ira ko tolo a romi'ad tangasa to roma a folad to falo a romi'ad, o sa'adihayay no podaw itini i lawacay no Siwkolan a 'alo, mafana' ko Pangcah/'Amis a finawlan mitala to ka'adihay kasaopo no podaw, itiya to a misanga to cadiway sapipodaw, lafii to i, makelih a talariyar ko mipodaway a tamdaw, roma i milepet to cadiway, roma i, misawsaw anca mihongila to mapodaway a pitelian, cidawdaw ko mifotingay a tamdaw, matedi i lawac no riyar, makapah a nengnengen. 3. Ano i pala i fanaw a mifoting cicadiway i, matiya to sapicada to marakaray i fanaw, itini i, fanaw 'adihay ko kasaromaroma a kakaenen, ira ko toda, cicic, afar, dadam, kahahirahira ko sasetiken. Caay ka nikaw to kakaenen ko mararokay a tamdaw, todongen no kasadakan no foting a mi'eten, ta caay kapilaliw ko matarakaray a matamaay, micomod to i tarakar, cadiwayen haca koya caayay ho pilaliw a foting. tahapinangan a tilid == pikafitan i papotal ==
S.PHON: == ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj == o~u taɬ~ɮaʦifənəkaj ko~u finawɾan no~u ʡamis, mafanaʡ a misaŋa to~u sapifo~utiŋ, o~unini a ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj maŋaʡaj a maɾano~ukamajan a ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u sapiaɾa sapipo~uɬ~ɮaw sapifo~utiŋ a ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj ka ko~uəsit a pisaŋa to~uni ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u pasifanaʡaj a mato~uʡasaj i, ħato~usaən ko~u pifaɾo~uɬ~ɮən to~u ʡao~uɾ, i təno~uk no~uja to~usa ʡao~uɾ i, pakətiŋən to~u kamo~uko~uaj a ʡao~uɾ, fo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮən to~u i kawanan ato~u kawiɾi a misaħo~uŋiɾa, səɾak ħan matija to~uno~u amiɾika a tiɾiɬ~ɮ a , iko~ur to~u faɾo~uɬ~ɮən ħo~u to~u ʡəriʦ ano~uʦa o~u ʡo~uwaj ko~u sapifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ a mikəɬ~ɮəʦ, saiko~uraj, itini ɾaəno~u no~uja a ʡao~uɾ, so~uwo~utən pakətiŋən to~u saɾiɾ, ŋo~ujo~us no~uja saɾiɾ, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡao~uɾ, maħapinaŋ to~u maŋaʡaj a sapitato~uj no~u nakamajan a sakatajaɾ. ano~u misaŋaʡ to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən to~u no~u nijaħ a takaraw, mimiŋ to~u, tataʡaŋ to~u, ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a mikako~uj. itini i fataʡan ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦi ɾaɾan ħananaj, o~u pisaŋa niŋra to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~uno~u tao~u a pisaŋa, nikao~urira, ira ko~u pifaɾiʦ niŋra to~u ro~uma, ko~utajən no~u ʡəɾiʦ ko~u tapaŋ no~ura ʡao~uɾ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ʦəɬ~ɮətən ko~u si a mipakətiŋ, to~uja ʡəɾiʦ, misako~uɬ~ɮaitan to~u ʡəɾiʦ, ikaka to~u no~u ʡao~uɾ ko~u kaħaɾafin. kaɾo~umaan o~u sapiʦaɬ~ɮiwaj to~u mamaŋaj fo~utiŋ i ʦiɾis ato~u ʦiʡəʦi, itija ħo~u taɬ~ɮatiŋaɾawaj ko~u nano~um no~u ʡaɾo~u to~u, siɾis to~u siʡəsi to~u, o~urasaka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mitaka ħananaj a mamaŋaj fo~utiŋ, itira ko~u maʡəmaŋaj miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj to~ufo~utiŋ,. ano~u pakaʡən to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ maparəsap ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, sa ira ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, matija o~u tasaɾaman ko~u maʡəmaŋaj a mifo~utiŋ, nikawrira o~u piħatatanam ko~unini to~u piʦaɬ~ɮiwaj. maɾakapaħ to~u i, itira to~u i rijarijaran a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj to~u po~uɬ~ɮaw , po~utər no~u kəɬ~ɮaʦaj , ato~u ħiʦaj no~u to~uɬ~ɮa. o~uninian saħəto~uaj i ɾawaʦ no~u rijar misiʡajawaj to~u tapəɾik, ira ko~u tapəɾik itijaaj a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw misiʡaʦ ko~u tapəɾik itijaaj a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj. taɾaħəkaɾ ko~u tapəɾik maħakəɾo~uŋaj ko~u fakəɾo~uħ ato~u tafo~uk, wataaj ko~u pisəko~uŋ no~una fakəɾo~uħ to~u o~uʡo~uʡ no~u miʦaɬ~ɮiwaja, itira ko~u piħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u ʡo~uʡo~u. saɾafii sa to~umirəŋ i tapəɾipəɾikan kinapinapina a mikako~uj to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiħaj, ano~u ʦaka pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u ro~uraj ʦaaj to~u pakakao~uj to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~urasaka, taɬ~ɮamaanaj to~u ko~u miʦaɬ~ɮiwajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. nikawrira,ano~u ko~umaʡən kita to~u po~uɬ~ɮaw o~urama a tamɬ~ɮaw misaʡo~usiʡo~usiaj ħo~u, o~uja kaħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw iraaj itira ko~u o~uɾaħ, ħaratəŋ to~u sapaini ako~u to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ sanaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ sa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~uni sətikan masaɾafii. o~u po~uɬ~ɮaw saħəto~uaj misasimian a ko~umaʡən, o~u ʦiɾaħ,o~u ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮam təɾi ħan i tawjo~u~u ħa pitənasan, o~uro~uma i, mifasfasan i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw, o~uno~u nijaħ a nikao~uɾaħ ko~u kako~umaən, ano~u kamaʡən to~u po~uɬ~ɮaw ʦa kaʦa ʦitakiɬ~ɮ to~u ʡəpaħ ta ʦaaj ka faŋɾiħ ko~u ŋo~ujo~us pataħtaħ a ko~umaʡən. kaitiraan maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u sapifo~utiŋ ko~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, maŋaʡaj i rijar, i aɾo~uʡ a mifo~utiŋ, i paɾa ano~uʦa i fanaw a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj. *.i aɾo~uʡ, ano~u sapiaɾa to~u fo~utiŋ ko~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj i, ʦiʦafaj ʦikapo~ut a taɾa aɾo~uʡ ko~u saŋaʡajaj, ʦəʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw i mirəpət to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, to~umirəŋ i nano~um no~u aɾo~uʡ, pasiʡajawən to~u kafafaw no~u nano~um ko~u ŋo~ujo~us no~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw miaɾa to~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ, təpatəpa ħan ko~u nano~um no~u aɾo~uʡ, o~u piɾapɾap to~u fo~utiŋ a misaʡo~upo~u, pasajɾa to~uja ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj a miɾapɾap, masaʡo~upo~u to~u a maaɾa. *.i rijar, i rijar, to~una fafaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u kakarajan, kaʦaŋɾaħan ato~u kaʦiħəraŋan, saka to~usa po~uɾo~u ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa to~u ro~uma a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u saʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw itini i ɾawaʦaj no~u siwko~uɾan a ʡaɾo~u, mafanaʡ ko~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis a finawɾan mitaɾa to~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj kasao~upo~u no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw, itija to~u a misaŋa to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj sapipo~uɬ~ɮaw, ɾafii to~u i, makəɾiħ a taɾarijar ko~u mipo~uɬ~ɮawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~uma i miɾəpət to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, ro~uma i, misawsaw anʦa miħo~uŋiɾa to~u mapo~uɬ~ɮawaj a pitəɾian, ʦiɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ko~u mifo~utiŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, matəɬ~ɮi i ɾawaʦ no~u rijar, makapaħ a nəŋnəŋən. *. ano~u i paɾa i fanaw a mifo~utiŋ ʦiʦaɬ~ɮiwaj i, matija to~u sapiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u marakaraj i fanaw, itini i, fanaw ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaro~umaro~uma a kakaənən, ira ko~u to~uɬ~ɮa, ʦiʦiʦ, afar, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮam, kaħaħiraħira ko~u sasətikən. ʦaaj ka nikaw to~u kakaənən ko~u mararo~ukaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən no~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u fo~utiŋ a miʡətən, ta ʦaaj kapiɾaɾiw ko~u matarakaraj a matamaaj, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i tarakar, ʦaɬ~ɮiwajən ħaʦa ko~uja ʦaajaj ħo~u piɾaɾiw a fo~utiŋ. taħapinaŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ == pikafitan i papo~utaɾ ==
S.FORM: == cadiway == O tadacifenekay ko finawlan no 'Amis, mafana' a misanga to sapifoting, onini a cadiway manga'ay a malanokamayan a cadiway, o sapiala sapipodaw sapifoting a losid, caay ka koesit a pisanga toni cadiway, o sowal no pasifana'ay a mato'asay i, hatosaen ko pifaloden to 'aol, i tenok noya tosa 'aol i, paketingen to kamokoay a 'aol, foloden to i kawanan ato kawili a misahongila, selak han matiya tono Amilika a tilid A , ikor to faloden ho to 'eric anoca o 'oway ko sapifalod a mikedec, saikoray, itini laeno noya A 'aol, sowoten paketingen to salil, ngoyos noya salil, patatodongen ko kakahad no 'aol, mahapinang to manga'ay a sapitatoy no nakamayan a sakatayal. Ano misanga' to cadiway, patatodongen to no niyah a takaraw, miming to, tata'ang to, caay kafilo a mikakoy. Itini i Fata'an ira ko cecay a tamdaw, ci Lalan hananay, O pisanga ningra to cadiway i, malecaday tono tao a pisanga, nikaorira, ira ko pifalic ningra to roma, kotayen no 'elic ko tapang nora 'aol, todohen cedeten ko si a mipaketing, toya 'elic, misakodaitan to 'elic, ikaka to no 'aol ko kahalafin. kalomaan O sapicadiway to mamangay foting i cilis ato ci'eci, itiya ho tadatingalaway ko nanom no 'alo to, silis to si'esi to, orasaka adihay ko mitaka hananay a mamangay foting, itira ko ma'emangay micadiway tofoting,. ano paka'en to kolong maparesap ko kolong, sa ira ko romi'ad a micadiway, matiya o tasalaman ko ma'emangay a mifoting, nikawrira o pihatatanam konini to picadiway. malakapah to i, itira to i riyariyaran a micadiway to podaw , poter no kedacay , ato hicay no toda. oninian sahetoay i lawac no riyar misi'ayaway to tapelik, ira ko tapelik itiyaay a micadiway, o roma tamdaw misi'ac ko tapelik itiyaay a micadiway. talahekal ko tapelik mahakelongay ko fakeloh ato tafok, wataay ko pisekong nona fakeloh to o'o' no micadiwaya, itira ko pihadidi to adada no 'o'o. salafii sa tomireng i tapelipelikan kinapinapina a mikakoy to cadihay, ano caka pakahadidi to roray caay to pakakaoy to cadiway, orasaka, tadamaanay to ko micadiwayay a tamdaw. Nikawrira,ano koma'en kita to podaw orama a tamdaw misa'osi'osiay ho, oya kahacecacecay no podaw iraay itira ko olah, harateng to sapaini ako to laloma'an ato widang sanay a faloco' sa adihay koni setikan masalafii. O podaw sahetoay misasimian a koma'en, o cilah,o damdam teli han i tawyu ha pitenasan, oroma i, mifasfasan i fafa'ed no podaw, ono niyah a nikaolah ko kakomaen, ano kama'en to podaw ca kaca citakid to 'epah ta caay ka fanglih ko ngoyos patahtah a koma'en. kaitiraan Malecad to sapifoting ko cadiway, manga'ay i riyar, i alo' a mifoting, i pala anoca i fanaw a micadiway. 1.i alo', ano sapiala to foting ko cadiway i, cicafay cikapot a tala alo' ko sanga'ayay, cecay tamdaw i mirepet to cadiway, tomireng i nanom no alo', pasi'ayawen to kafafaw no nanom ko ngoyos no cadiway, o cecay a tamdaw miala to papah no kilang, tepatepa han ko nanom no alo', o pilaplap to foting a misa'opo, pasayla toya cadiway a milaplap, masa'opo to a maala. 2.i riyar, I riyar, tona fafalic no romi'ad no kakarayan, kacanglahan ato kaciherangan, saka tosa polo ira ko tolo a romi'ad tangasa to roma a folad to falo a romi'ad, o sa'adihayay no podaw itini i lawacay no Siwkolan a 'alo, mafana' ko Pangcah/'Amis a finawlan mitala to ka'adihay kasaopo no podaw, itiya to a misanga to cadiway sapipodaw, lafii to i, makelih a talariyar ko mipodaway a tamdaw, roma i milepet to cadiway, roma i, misawsaw anca mihongila to mapodaway a pitelian, cidawdaw ko mifotingay a tamdaw, matedi i lawac no riyar, makapah a nengnengen. 3. Ano i pala i fanaw a mifoting cicadiway i, matiya to sapicada to marakaray i fanaw, itini i, fanaw 'adihay ko kasaromaroma a kakaenen, ira ko toda, cicic, afar, dadam, kahahirahira ko sasetiken. Caay ka nikaw to kakaenen ko mararokay a tamdaw, todongen no kasadakan no foting a mi'eten, ta caay kapilaliw ko matarakaray a matamaay, micomod to i tarakar, cadiwayen haca koya caayay ho pilaliw a foting. tahapinangan a tilid == pikafitan i papotal ==
S.PHON: == ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj == o~u taɬ~ɮaʦifənəkaj ko~u finawɾan no~u ʡamis, mafanaʡ a misaŋa to~u sapifo~utiŋ, o~unini a ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj maŋaʡaj a maɾano~ukamajan a ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u sapiaɾa sapipo~uɬ~ɮaw sapifo~utiŋ a ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj ka ko~uəsit a pisaŋa to~uni ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u pasifanaʡaj a mato~uʡasaj i, ħato~usaən ko~u pifaɾo~uɬ~ɮən to~u ʡao~uɾ, i təno~uk no~uja to~usa ʡao~uɾ i, pakətiŋən to~u kamo~uko~uaj a ʡao~uɾ, fo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮən to~u i kawanan ato~u kawiɾi a misaħo~uŋiɾa, səɾak ħan matija to~uno~u amiɾika a tiɾiɬ~ɮ a , iko~ur to~u faɾo~uɬ~ɮən ħo~u to~u ʡəriʦ ano~uʦa o~u ʡo~uwaj ko~u sapifaɾo~uɬ~ɮ a mikəɬ~ɮəʦ, saiko~uraj, itini ɾaəno~u no~uja a ʡao~uɾ, so~uwo~utən pakətiŋən to~u saɾiɾ, ŋo~ujo~us no~uja saɾiɾ, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡao~uɾ, maħapinaŋ to~u maŋaʡaj a sapitato~uj no~u nakamajan a sakatajaɾ. ano~u misaŋaʡ to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən to~u no~u nijaħ a takaraw, mimiŋ to~u, tataʡaŋ to~u, ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a mikako~uj. itini i fataʡan ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦi ɾaɾan ħananaj, o~u pisaŋa niŋra to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~uno~u tao~u a pisaŋa, nikao~urira, ira ko~u pifaɾiʦ niŋra to~u ro~uma, ko~utajən no~u ʡəɾiʦ ko~u tapaŋ no~ura ʡao~uɾ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ʦəɬ~ɮətən ko~u si a mipakətiŋ, to~uja ʡəɾiʦ, misako~uɬ~ɮaitan to~u ʡəɾiʦ, ikaka to~u no~u ʡao~uɾ ko~u kaħaɾafin. kaɾo~umaan o~u sapiʦaɬ~ɮiwaj to~u mamaŋaj fo~utiŋ i ʦiɾis ato~u ʦiʡəʦi, itija ħo~u taɬ~ɮatiŋaɾawaj ko~u nano~um no~u ʡaɾo~u to~u, siɾis to~u siʡəsi to~u, o~urasaka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mitaka ħananaj a mamaŋaj fo~utiŋ, itira ko~u maʡəmaŋaj miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj to~ufo~utiŋ,. ano~u pakaʡən to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ maparəsap ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, sa ira ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, matija o~u tasaɾaman ko~u maʡəmaŋaj a mifo~utiŋ, nikawrira o~u piħatatanam ko~unini to~u piʦaɬ~ɮiwaj. maɾakapaħ to~u i, itira to~u i rijarijaran a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj to~u po~uɬ~ɮaw , po~utər no~u kəɬ~ɮaʦaj , ato~u ħiʦaj no~u to~uɬ~ɮa. o~uninian saħəto~uaj i ɾawaʦ no~u rijar misiʡajawaj to~u tapəɾik, ira ko~u tapəɾik itijaaj a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw misiʡaʦ ko~u tapəɾik itijaaj a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj. taɾaħəkaɾ ko~u tapəɾik maħakəɾo~uŋaj ko~u fakəɾo~uħ ato~u tafo~uk, wataaj ko~u pisəko~uŋ no~una fakəɾo~uħ to~u o~uʡo~uʡ no~u miʦaɬ~ɮiwaja, itira ko~u piħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u ʡo~uʡo~u. saɾafii sa to~umirəŋ i tapəɾipəɾikan kinapinapina a mikako~uj to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiħaj, ano~u ʦaka pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u ro~uraj ʦaaj to~u pakakao~uj to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~urasaka, taɬ~ɮamaanaj to~u ko~u miʦaɬ~ɮiwajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. nikawrira,ano~u ko~umaʡən kita to~u po~uɬ~ɮaw o~urama a tamɬ~ɮaw misaʡo~usiʡo~usiaj ħo~u, o~uja kaħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw iraaj itira ko~u o~uɾaħ, ħaratəŋ to~u sapaini ako~u to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ sanaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ sa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~uni sətikan masaɾafii. o~u po~uɬ~ɮaw saħəto~uaj misasimian a ko~umaʡən, o~u ʦiɾaħ,o~u ɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮam təɾi ħan i tawjo~u~u ħa pitənasan, o~uro~uma i, mifasfasan i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw, o~uno~u nijaħ a nikao~uɾaħ ko~u kako~umaən, ano~u kamaʡən to~u po~uɬ~ɮaw ʦa kaʦa ʦitakiɬ~ɮ to~u ʡəpaħ ta ʦaaj ka faŋɾiħ ko~u ŋo~ujo~us pataħtaħ a ko~umaʡən. kaitiraan maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u sapifo~utiŋ ko~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, maŋaʡaj i rijar, i aɾo~uʡ a mifo~utiŋ, i paɾa ano~uʦa i fanaw a miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj. *.i aɾo~uʡ, ano~u sapiaɾa to~u fo~utiŋ ko~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj i, ʦiʦafaj ʦikapo~ut a taɾa aɾo~uʡ ko~u saŋaʡajaj, ʦəʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw i mirəpət to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, to~umirəŋ i nano~um no~u aɾo~uʡ, pasiʡajawən to~u kafafaw no~u nano~um ko~u ŋo~ujo~us no~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, o~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw miaɾa to~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ, təpatəpa ħan ko~u nano~um no~u aɾo~uʡ, o~u piɾapɾap to~u fo~utiŋ a misaʡo~upo~u, pasajɾa to~uja ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj a miɾapɾap, masaʡo~upo~u to~u a maaɾa. *.i rijar, i rijar, to~una fafaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u kakarajan, kaʦaŋɾaħan ato~u kaʦiħəraŋan, saka to~usa po~uɾo~u ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa to~u ro~uma a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u saʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw itini i ɾawaʦaj no~u siwko~uɾan a ʡaɾo~u, mafanaʡ ko~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis a finawɾan mitaɾa to~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj kasao~upo~u no~u po~uɬ~ɮaw, itija to~u a misaŋa to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj sapipo~uɬ~ɮaw, ɾafii to~u i, makəɾiħ a taɾarijar ko~u mipo~uɬ~ɮawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~uma i miɾəpət to~u ʦaɬ~ɮiwaj, ro~uma i, misawsaw anʦa miħo~uŋiɾa to~u mapo~uɬ~ɮawaj a pitəɾian, ʦiɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ko~u mifo~utiŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, matəɬ~ɮi i ɾawaʦ no~u rijar, makapaħ a nəŋnəŋən. *. ano~u i paɾa i fanaw a mifo~utiŋ ʦiʦaɬ~ɮiwaj i, matija to~u sapiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u marakaraj i fanaw, itini i, fanaw ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaro~umaro~uma a kakaənən, ira ko~u to~uɬ~ɮa, ʦiʦiʦ, afar, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮam, kaħaħiraħira ko~u sasətikən. ʦaaj ka nikaw to~u kakaənən ko~u mararo~ukaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən no~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u fo~utiŋ a miʡətən, ta ʦaaj kapiɾaɾiw ko~u matarakaraj a matamaaj, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i tarakar, ʦaɬ~ɮiwajən ħaʦa ko~uja ʦaajaj ħo~u piɾaɾiw a fo~utiŋ. taħapinaŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ == pikafitan i papo~utaɾ ==
